summary: Tested Contextual Advocacy feature enhancements. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend code review confirmed all Advocate buttons and Relationship History section correctly implemented. Playwright tests had auth redirect issues preventing UI verification.
critical_code_review_comments: SupportPod.js (lines 328-336): SchoolRow has Advocate button with data-testid='advocate-school-{program_id}' that navigates to /advocacy/new?athlete={athleteId}&schoolName={university_name}. Button uses Megaphone icon and appears on hover (opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100)

EventSummary.js (lines 101-113): NoteActions has Advocate button with data-testid='advocate-note-{note.id}' that appears only when note has school_name. Uses Megaphone icon and navigates to /advocacy/new with athlete_id and school_name params

SchoolPod.js (lines 384-391): Hero action buttons include Advocate with data-testid='hero-btn-advocate', uses Megaphone icon and navigates to /advocacy/new?athlete={athleteId}&schoolName={program.university_name}

RecommendationBuilder.js (lines 417-449): Relationship History section with data-testid='relationship-context' shows previous_advocacy array and event_notes. Displays when either previous_advocacy.length > 0 OR event_notes.length > 0
advocacy.py endpoint GET /api/advocacy/athlete-context/{athlete_id}/{school_id} correctly returns previous_advocacy array with id, status, created_at, school_name, fit_summary fields
AthleteContextCard displays pipeline_status, last_contact, momentum_score, momentum_trend, school_targets from athlete-context endpoint

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - UI tests blocked by auth redirect

seed_data_creation: Created test recommendation to verify previous_advocacy is returned: rec_d5ae61a0
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contextual Advocacy feature fully implemented. Backend APIs working correctly. Key features verified via code review: 1) SupportPod SchoolRow has Advocate button on hover (opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100) with data-testid='advocate-school-{program_id}'. 2) EventSummary NoteActions has Advocate button when note.school_name exists with data-testid='advocate-note-{note.id}'. 3) SchoolPod hero has Advocate button with data-testid='hero-btn-advocate'. 4) RecommendationBuilder shows Relationship History section when previous_advocacy or event_notes exist. 5) URL params ?athlete=athlete_1&schoolName=Stanford%20University pre-fill athlete and school. 6) GET /api/advocacy/athlete-context returns previous_advocacy array with id, status, created_at, school_name, fit_summary.
